mapper.update: UPDATE task_run SET lease_owner = #{workerId}, lease_until = TIMESTAMPADD( SECOND, #{leaseSeconds}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) ), heartbeat_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ('RUNNING', 'PAUSED', 'WAITING_CHILD_JOB') AND ( lease_owner IS NULL OR lease_until IS NULL OR lease_until <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) OR lease_owner = #{workerId} )

UPDATE task_run SET lease_until = TIMESTAMPADD( SECOND, #{leaseSeconds}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) ), heartbeat_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ('RUNNING', 'PAUSED', 'WAITING_CHILD_JOB') AND lease_owner = #{workerId}

UPDATE task_run SET lease_owner = NULL, lease_until = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND lease_owner = #{workerId}
mapper.select: SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(task_run.id) AS taskRunId, BIN_TO_UUID(job.id) AS jobId, BIN_TO_UUID(task.id) AS taskId, task_run.status AS taskRunStatus, task_run.lease_owner AS leaseOwner, task_run.lease_until AS leaseUntil, BIN_TO_UUID(checkpoint.id) AS checkpointId, checkpoint.checkpoint_type AS checkpointType, checkpoint.restorable AS checkpointRestorable, checkpoint.checksum = LOWER(SHA2(CAST(checkpoint.state_json AS CHAR), 256)) AS checkpointChecksumValid, BIN_TO_UUID(checkpoint.loop_run_id) AS loopRunId, loop_run.parent_type AS loopRunParentType, BIN_TO_UUID(checkpoint.loop_node_id) AS loopNodeId, loop_node.status AS loopNodeStatus, loop_node.action_type AS actionType, loop_node.side_effect_class AS sideEffectClass FROM task_run JOIN task ON task.id = task_run.task_id JOIN job ON job.id = task.job_id LEFT JOIN checkpoint ON checkpoint.id = task_run.latest_checkpoint_id LEFT JOIN loop_run ON loop_run.id = checkpoint.loop_run_id LEFT JOIN loop_node ON loop_node.id = checkpoint.loop_node_id WHERE task_run.id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(checkpoint.id) AS checkpointId, checkpoint.checkpoint_type AS checkpointType, BIN_TO_UUID(job.id) AS jobId, BIN_TO_UUID(task.id) AS taskId, BIN_TO_UUID(task_run.id) AS taskRunId, BIN_TO_UUID(loop_run.id) AS loopRunId, BIN_TO_UUID(loop_node.id) AS loopNodeId, BIN_TO_UUID(loop_node.parent_node_id) AS parentNodeId, loop_node.depth, loop_node.iteration_no AS iterationNo, loop_run.parent_type AS loopRunParentType, BIN_TO_UUID(loop_run.parent_id) AS loopRunParentId, loop_run.recursion_depth AS recursionDepth, COALESCE( JSON_UNQUOTE( JSON_EXTRACT(loop_node.decision_json, '$.provider') ), JSON_UNQUOTE( JSON_EXTRACT(job.policy_json, '$.providerId') ), 'fake' ) AS providerId, loop_node.goal, COALESCE( JSON_UNQUOTE( JSON_EXTRACT( loop_node.input_json, '$.inheritedFeedback' ) ), '' ) AS feedback, loop_node.action_type AS actionType, COALESCE( JSON_UNQUOTE( JSON_EXTRACT( loop_node.decision_json, '$.completionCriterion' ) ), '恢复动作产生可验证结果' ) AS completionCriterion, COALESCE( CAST( JSON_UNQUOTE( JSON_EXTRACT( loop_node.decision_json, '$.maxTokens' ) ) AS UNSIGNED ), 512 ) AS maxTokens, BIN_TO_UUID(action_phase.id) AS actionPhaseId, action_phase.status AS actionPhaseStatus FROM task_run JOIN task ON task.id = task_run.task_id JOIN job ON job.id = task.job_id JOIN checkpoint ON checkpoint.id = task_run.latest_checkpoint_id JOIN loop_run ON loop_run.id = checkpoint.loop_run_id JOIN loop_node ON loop_node.id = checkpoint.loop_node_id LEFT JOIN loop_node_phase action_phase ON action_phase.loop_node_id = loop_node.id AND action_phase.phase_type = 'ACTION_EXECUTION' WHERE task_run.id = #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(job.id) AS jobId, BIN_TO_UUID(task.id) AS taskId, BIN_TO_UUID(task_run.id) AS taskRunId, BIN_TO_UUID(loop_run.id) AS loopRunId, BIN_TO_UUID(loop_node.id) AS loopNodeId, BIN_TO_UUID(loop_node.parent_node_id) AS parentNodeId, loop_node.depth, loop_node.iteration_no AS iterationNo, loop_run.parent_type AS loopRunParentType, BIN_TO_UUID(loop_run.parent_id) AS loopRunParentId, loop_run.recursion_depth AS recursionDepth, COALESCE( JSON_UNQUOTE( JSON_EXTRACT(loop_node.decision_json, '$.provider') ), JSON_UNQUOTE( JSON_EXTRACT(job.policy_json, '$.providerId') ), 'fake' ) AS providerId, loop_node.goal, COALESCE( JSON_UNQUOTE( JSON_EXTRACT( loop_node.input_json, '$.inheritedFeedback' ) ), '' ) AS feedback, COALESCE( JSON_UNQUOTE( JSON_EXTRACT( loop_node.decision_json, '$.completionCriterion' ) ), 'Child Job 完成并回传满足合同的结果' ) AS completionCriterion FROM loop_node JOIN loop_run ON loop_run.id = loop_node.loop_run_id JOIN task_run ON task_run.id = loop_run.task_run_id JOIN task ON task.id = task_run.task_id JOIN job ON job.id = task.job_id WHERE loop_node.id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}

SELECT CAST(outcome_json AS CHAR) FROM job_derivation WHERE origin_loop_node_id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'COMPLETED' AND outcome_json IS NOT NULL

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS clarificationRequestId, question, answer FROM clarification_request WHERE loop_node_id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'RESOLVED' AND answer IS NOT NULL ORDER BY resolved_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(task_run.id) FROM task_run JOIN checkpoint ON checkpoint.id = task_run.latest_checkpoint_id WHERE task_run.status IN ('RUNNING', 'WAITING_CHILD_JOB') AND checkpoint.restorable = TRUE AND checkpoint.checkpoint_type IN ( 'RUN_START', 'ACTION_PREPARED', 'CHILD_LOOP_CREATED', 'CHILD_JOB_CREATED', 'CLARIFICATION_ANSWERED' ) AND ( task_run.lease_until IS NULL OR task_run.lease_until <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) ) ORDER BY task_run.updated_at LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recovery_attempt ( id, task_run_id, checkpoint_id, interruption_type, disposition, decision_code, status, context_json ) VALUES ( #{attemptId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{checkpointId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{interruptionType}, #{disposition}, #{decisionCode}, #{status}, CAST(#{contextJson} AS JSON) )
mapper.update: UPDATE recovery_attempt SET status = #{status}, context_json = CAST(#{contextJson} AS JSON), completed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('COMPLETED', 'FAILED') THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) ELSE completed_at END WHERE id = #{attemptId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
